nodes.label: AI as knowledge refresher for unfamiliar topics
nodes.grounding_span: I do not use it to research a topic that I do not know about

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: there were a lot of hallucinations, misinterpretation of the data

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to do a lot more collaboration

nodes.label: AI as efficiency booster in healthcare
nodes.grounding_span: there are standards of practice and stuff that I have to abide by

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I use it more creatively for things like social media brainstorming

nodes.label: AI for mundane tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it could take over mundane day-to-day tasks like charting

nodes.label: Accuracy and factual reliability
nodes.grounding_span: it is very important that the evidence that I am pulling from is solid

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: I then learn the presentation as I make it

nodes.label: Regulatory compliance and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: for regulatory reasons, it's better that I don't use AI for charting

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I can scan pretty quickly and easily make sure that everything is correct

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: It actually provided really good ideas once I clarified what it was that I wanted

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for factual accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: It kept giving me information that I knew was blatantly wrong

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I have found that it's more work for me to double check AI's work than to do the research myself

nodes.label: Guilt about secret AI use
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I am hesitant to tell them that I have used AI

nodes.label: Domain-specific quality control — uses familiarity to verify AI output
nodes.grounding_span: If I'm using it to synthesize information on familiar topics, I can scan pretty quickly and easily make sure that everything is correct

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I generally come back and review it with AI afterwards
